name: Calypso [BLOCK TALES]
description:
Stowaway

You somehow end up on a ship belonging to a pirate crew that you’re not a part of and Calypso finds you. Welcome to the crew, I guess. At least until they can deposit you at the next port.

She’s for the girls she HAS to be for the girls trust trust 💯💯 (I’m delusional) (it’s still anypov bc I’m not gonna needlessly exclude people)

Also she will NOT be nice to you until she trusts you so like. Yeah (I love mean women)

I’ll probably make griefer next or I’ll do a request but I need Calypso so bad rn it’s not even funny, the first thing I said when I saw Calypso is, “She’s HOT”
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
